.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Updated the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Reordered import statements to follow standard Java conventions (java.io before java.net).
Reformatted string concatenation for DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL to improve readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Combined multi-line string concatenation into a single line assignment

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted constant assignments for MAVEN_WRAPPER_PROPERTIES_PATH and MAVEN_WRAPPER_JAR_PATH.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Removed unnecessary line breaks in constant string assignments

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Added missing spaces after 'if' keywords to comply with standard code style.
Added missing spaces after 'if' keywords in nested conditional blocks.
Reformatted the anonymous Authenticator class instantiation for better indentation and readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Re-indented the new Authenticator() block and its method override

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Removed trailing empty line at the end of the file.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Deleted empty line after closing brace

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer JHipster versions.
Update the version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.
Convert multi-line string concatenation to Java 13+ text blocks for improved readability and maintainability.
Integrate CRLFLogConverter marker to ensure log messages are safe for CRLF line endings, likely a framework-specific logging improvement.
Modify active profile logging to display default profiles when no active profiles are explicitly set, improving startup information clarity.
Replace escaped single quotes with literal single quotes in log message string to fix formatting or adhere to stricter string literal standards.
Insert JHipster generator needle comments into the configuration properties class to allow automated code generation.
Restrict the AsyncConfiguration bean to non-test profiles to prevent conflicts with test-specific configurations.
Update single-element annotation attribute to use explicit array syntax for consistency with modern Java style conventions.
Replace the legacy Hibernate5Module with Hibernate5JakartaModule to support Jakarta EE namespace changes required for Spring Boot 3 and Java 17+ compatibility.
Remove the explicit registration of ProblemModule and ConstraintViolationProblemModule, likely because they are now auto-configured or no longer needed in the updated framework version.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for org.zalando.problem.ProblemModule and org.zalando.problem.violations.ConstraintViolationProblemModule and their corresponding @Bean methods.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Liquibase bean configuration to use the new setLabelFilter method instead of the deprecated setLabels method.
Reorder method parameters in the Spring bean definition to align with updated framework conventions or dependency injection requirements.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Moved @LiquibaseDataSource ObjectProvider<DataSource> liquibaseDataSource after LiquibaseProperties liquibaseProperties

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor Spring Security configuration from the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter to the modern SecurityFilterChain bean approach required for Spring Security 5.7+/6.x.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace the deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 5.7+ standards.
Remove custom AjaxAuthenticationSuccessHandler/FailureHandler and AjaxLogoutSuccessHandler beans in favor of standard Spring Security handlers.
Update CSRF configuration to use the new lambda DSL and explicitly set CsrfTokenRequestAttributeHandler to fix compatibility issues in newer Spring Security versions.
Introduce a custom SpaWebFilter to handle Single Page Application routing requirements within the security filter chain.
Add a CookieCsrfFilter to the security chain to ensure CSRF tokens are correctly handled via cookies for the application.
Remove the integration of SecurityProblemSupport for exception handling, likely moving to a different error handling strategy or relying on defaults.
Remove the explicit injection and addition of CorsFilter, likely delegating CORS configuration to other mechanisms or removing it from this specific security config.
Simplify the constructor by removing dependencies that are no longer used in the refactored security configuration.
Consolidate static resource locations by removing the specific app subdirectory in favor of the root static directory.
Update resource path patterns to explicitly match file extensions and adjust path wildcards for better static resource resolution.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced "/app/*", "/content/*", "/i18n/*" with explicit extension patterns like "/*.js", "/*.css" and adjusted wildcards for content/i18n.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting logic.
Remove try-catch for UnsupportedEncodingException because StandardCharsets.UTF_8 is always supported in modern Java.
Update CORS configuration check to include allowedOriginPatterns, which is required for wildcard origins in newer Spring Security versions.
Update CORS registration paths to match Swagger UI 3 / OpenAPI 3 endpoints instead of legacy Swagger 2 endpoints.
